Exquisite Royal Banarasi Silk Saree crafted with traditional weaving techniques. Features intricate gold zari work and beautiful floral motifs. Perfect for weddings and special occasions.

Key Features:

  • 100% Pure Banarasi Silk
  • Traditional Handwoven
  • Gold Zari Work
  • 6.5 meters length
  • Includes matching blouse piece
  • Dry clean only
